title: nocca helianthifolia var. adenocaulis
intro: Nocca helianthifolia var. adenocaulis, commonly known as Nocca or Adenocaulis, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The medicinal properties of Nocca helianthifolia var. adenocaulis have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive problems, respiratory issues, and urinary tract infections, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce menstrual cramps. Nocca helianthifolia var. adenocaulis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in some traditional medicine practices.
